### v1.48.2 - July 16th, 2026

#### P.S. If you see any of us in town or raid, feel free to drop an honor!

- **Snowving** on Luterra
- **Administrator** on Ratik
- **Poont** on Giena

### Note: ExitLag users must check the ExitLag Compatibility setting

#### BUG FIXES AND IMPROVEMENTS

- fixed paladin identity issue and others
- raid prog stats fixes
    - auto selects date when difficulty is selected
    - calendar starts on sunday
    - only the first death on wiped pulls count towards death counts (raid wipes count towards everyone)

#### PREVIOUS CHANGES

- added ark grid loadout to player tooltips. ark grid and ark passive in this tooltip accurately reflects loadout at the
  end of the raid
- added progression stats (try it out in your extreme aegir prog)
- added more delete options in database settings
